title.en: Agency Use of FedRAMP Certified Cloud Services

description.en: The Agency Use rules summarize the many demands made on agencies by the FedRAMP Authorization Act and OMB Memorandum M-24-15 in a simple, clear, easy-to-follow set of FedRAMP-style rules. These rules align agency policies, authorization letters, machine-readable tools, secure configuration review, continuous monitoring, and communication with FedRAMP so certifications can be reused consistently across government.
